2014 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki

Chronology
2013 in KSW 2014 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki 2015 in KSW

The year 2014 was the eleventh year in the history of the Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Poland. In 2014 Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki held 4 events beginning with, KSW 26: Materla vs. Silva III.

List of events

[edit]
# Event Title Date Arena Location
1 KSW 26: Materla vs. Silva 3 March 22, 2014 Hala Torwar Warsaw, Poland
2 KSW 27: Cage Time May 17, 2014 Ergo Arena Gdańsk, Poland
3 KSW 28: Fighters Den October 4, 2014 Azoty Arena Szczecin, Poland
4 KSW 29: Reload December 6, 2014 Tauron Arena Kraków, Poland

Title fights

[edit]
Title fights in 2014
# Weight Class Method Round Time Event Notes
1 Middleweight 84 kg Michał Materla (c) def. Jay Silva Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00 KSW 26 For the KSW Middleweight Championship
2 Female Strawweight 52 kg Karolina Kowalkiewicz (c) def. Jasminka Cive Submission (Armbar) 1 3:53 KSW 27 For the KSW Women's Strawweight Championship
3 Welterweight 77 kg Borys Mankowski def. Aslambek Saidov (c) Submission (Triangle Choke) 2 4:27 KSW 27 For the KSW Welterweight Championship
4 Heavyweight 120 kg Karol Bedorf (c) def. Rolles Gracie TKO (Kick To The Body And Punches) 1 4:04 KSW 28 For the KSW Heavyweight Championship
5 Welterweight 77 kg Borys Mańkowski (c) def. David Zawada Submission (Arm-Triangle Choke) 1 0:43 KSW 29 For the KSW Welterweight Championship

KSW 27: Cage Time

[edit]
KSW 27: Cage Time
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateMay 17, 2014
VenueErgo Arena
City Gdańsk, Poland
Attendance12,223
Event chronology
KSW 26 KSW 27: Cage Time KSW 28

KSW 27: Cage Time was a mixed martial arts event held on May 17, 2014 at the Ergo Arena in Gdańsk, Poland .

Background

[edit]

It was the first event promoted by KSW where the traditional white ring was replaced by a circular cage which became the new standard for future Polish MMA events.
